# BDE Score

> Open-source multi-factor stock scoring engine. 7-factor composite model (VIX, Volume Profile, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, OBV, ATR) covering 74 stocks across US, HK, and China A-share markets. EU AI Act Art.50 compliant.

## API Endpoints

- `GET https://provides-part-lamb-leaves.trycloudflare.com/api/analyze?market=ALL` — Score all 74 stocks
- `GET https://provides-part-lamb-leaves.trycloudflare.com/api/analyze?ticker=AAPL` — Score single stock
- `GET https://provides-part-lamb-leaves.trycloudflare.com/api/top?market=US&n=10` — Top N performers
- `GET https://provides-part-lamb-leaves.trycloudflare.com/api/worst?market=US&n=10` — Worst N performers
- `GET https://provides-part-lamb-leaves.trycloudflare.com/api/market` — Market overview (VIX, breadth)

## MCP Server

Connect BDE Score as an MCP tool for Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP client:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "bde-score": {
      "url": "https://muscle-prison-explore-recorded.trycloudflare.com/mcp",
      "headers": {
        "X-API-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## 7-Factor Model

Each stock receives a composite score (0-100):
- **VIX Regime** (weight: adaptive) — Market fear gauge overlay
- **Volume Profile** — Institutional accumulation/distribution detection
- **RSI** (14-period) — Momentum and mean reversion signals
- **MACD** — Trend direction and momentum shifts
- **Bollinger Bands** — Volatility regime and price extremes
- **OBV** — Volume-confirmed trend strength
- **ATR** — Risk-normalized volatility measure

Signal: Strong Buy (>75), Buy (65-75), Neutral (40-65), Sell (25-40), Strong Sell (<25).

## Discovery

- Official MCP Registry: `bde-score`
- Agent Card: https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/.well-known/agent.json
- MCP Discovery: https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/.well-known/mcp.json
